models.display_name: Claude Fable 5 (Adaptive Reasoning, Max Effort, Opus 4.8 Fallback)

offers.notes: Model Garden partner model. Same per-1M as Anthropic list price

Claude 5 / Mythos-class tier, above Opus. Most capable widely released model. 5m cache write $12.50/MTok (1.25x); 1h cache write $20/MTok (2x); cache read $1/MTok (0.1x). Output incl. thinking (thinking always on). 1M context at standard pricing. 128K max output. Batch API: $5 in / $25 out. Requires 30-day data retention. Claude Mythos 5 (claude-mythos-5, Project Glasswing only) has identical pricing.

Not present in Price List bulk API EU data; current public on-demand price (Bedrock matches Anthropic direct API as of 2026-06). Served in EU via EU cross-region inference profile (eu.anthropic.*); cross-region adds ~10% in some configs.

Highest Sonnet > 4.5. 5m cache write $3.75/MTok (1.25x); 1h cache write $6/MTok (2x); cache read $0.30/MTok (0.1x). Output incl. thinking. 1M context at standard pricing. 64K max output. Batch API: $1.50 in / $7.50 out. No Fast mode.

Same token pricing as Opus 4.8. 5m cache write $6.25/MTok; 1h cache write $10/MTok; cache read $0.50/MTok. Output incl. thinking. 1M context at standard pricing. Batch API: $2.50 in / $12.50 out. Fast mode (research preview): $30 in / $150 out.
